name.full: The Great Trading Company — LOB MCP Apps

description.short: Manage Salesforce CRM, ServiceNow ITSM, SAP ERP, and HubSpot CRM from one command post
description.full: A unified MCP Apps agent that connects to Salesforce (Leads, Opportunities), ServiceNow (Incidents, Requests), SAP S/4HANA (Purchase Orders, Materials, Business Partners), and HubSpot (Contacts, Deals) — rendering interactive widgets directly in M365 Copilot chat with full CRUD capability.
